faq.title: FAQs
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about our AI image to video generation service.

items.question: What is an AI image to video generator?
items.answer: An AI image to video generator is a tool that uses artificial intelligence to animate static images and create short video clips. It analyzes your uploaded image and transforms it into dynamic motion based on your text prompts or automatic scene understanding.

items.question: What is the best image to video AI generator?
items.answer: GeminiOmni gives creators one place to animate images into cinematic videos with fast online AI video tools.

items.question: What makes GeminiOmni's image to video generator stand out?
items.answer: GeminiOmni pairs practical image-to-video generation with Gemini Omni-style prompt guidance, reference control, and creator-friendly video workflows.

items.question: What types of images work best with GeminiOmni?
items.answer: GeminiOmni works with common image formats including JPG, PNG, and WEBP. For best results, use high-quality images with clear subjects and good lighting.

items.question: Is GeminiOmni's image to video generator free?
items.answer: GeminiOmni offers free trial credits and paid options for supported AI video generation models.

cta.title: Breathe Life into Your Static Images!
cta.description: Turn any photo into a stunning video with our AI image to video generator. Upload your image and watch it come to life in seconds.

aiModelsHero.title: All-in-One AI Image to Video Generator
aiModelsHero.description: GeminiOmni is an all-in-one AI image to video generator. Animate images with cinematic motion, prompt control, and creator-friendly AI video workflows.

imageToVideoShowcase.title: Animate Your Images with Our Image to Video AI Generator
imageToVideoShowcase.description: Turn any static image into a vivid story with GeminiOmni. Generate creative videos from uploaded photos using supported AI video models.

examples.videoAlt: Anime girl smiling and poking camera
examples.prompt: The little girl keeps smiling at the camera and pokes the lens with her finger.

examples.prompt: The T-Rex's head pokes out of the camera.

examples.prompt: A mother walks happily holding her child's hand.
The motorcycle is speeding, and the tail light turns into a line.
